description: Python lint/type/test gates on stop (changed files, stack-neutral auto-detect)

hooks.command: for _py in python3 python py; do command -v "$_py" >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec "$_py" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/format-on-stop.py"; done; echo 'python plugin: no python interpreter (python3/python/py) on PATH; skipping format gate' >&2

for _py in python3 python py; do command -v "$_py" >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec "$_py" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/typecheck-on-stop.py"; done; echo 'python plugin: no python interpreter (python3/python/py) on PATH; skipping type gate' >&2

for _py in python3 python py; do command -v "$_py" >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec "$_py" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/test-on-stop.py"; done; echo 'python plugin: no python interpreter (python3/python/py) on PATH; skipping test gate' >&2
